mapper.insert:
/* 발전수익 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_gen_revenue ( site_id, gen_type, std_timestamp, std_date, meter_read_day, smp_rate, rec_rate, rec_weight, produce_val, consume_val, net_gen_val, smp_price, rec_price, tot_price, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.genType}, #{entity.stdTimestamp}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.meterReadDay}, #{entity.smpRate}, #{entity.recRate}, #{entity.recWeight}, #{entity.produceVal}, #{entity.consumeVal}, #{entity.netGenVal}, #{entity.smpPrice}, #{entity.recPrice}, #{entity.totPrice}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* 발전수익 수정 */ UPDATE tb_gen_revenue
site_id = #{entity.siteId},
gen_type = #{entity.genType},
std_timestamp = #{entity.stdTimestamp},
std_date = #{entity.stdDate},
meter_read_day = #{entity.meterReadDay},
smp_rate = #{entity.smpRate},
rec_rate = #{entity.recRate},
rec_weight = #{entity.recWeight},
produce_val = #{entity.produceVal},
consume_val = #{entity.consumeVal},
net_gen_val = #{entity.netGenVal},
smp_price = #{entity.smpPrice},
rec_price = #{entity.recPrice},
tot_price = #{entity.totPrice},
mod_date = NOW()
WHERE gen_revn_idx = #{entity.genRevnIdx}
mapper.select: /* 발전수익 상세조회 */ SELECT gen_revn_idx, site_id, gen_type, std_timestamp, std_date, meter_read_day, smp_rate, rec_rate, rec_weight, produce_val, consume_val, net_gen_val, smp_price, rec_price, tot_price, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_gen_revenue WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND gen_type = #{genType} AND std_timestamp = #{stdTimestamp}

/* 발전수익 상세조회 */ SELECT gen_revn_idx, site_id, gen_type, std_timestamp, std_date, meter_read_day, smp_rate, rec_rate, rec_weight, produce_val, consume_val, net_gen_val, smp_price, rec_price, tot_price, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_gen_revenue WHERE site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY std_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

/* 발전수익 상세조회 */ SELECT gen_revn_idx, site_id, gen_type, std_timestamp, std_date, meter_read_day, smp_rate, rec_rate, rec_weight, produce_val, consume_val, net_gen_val, smp_price, rec_price, tot_price, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_gen_revenue WHERE gen_revn_idx = #{genRevnIdx}

/* 발전수익 목록조회 */ SELECT gen_revn_idx, site_id, gen_type, std_timestamp, std_date, meter_read_day, smp_rate, rec_rate, rec_weight, produce_val, consume_val, net_gen_val, smp_price, rec_price, tot_price, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_gen_revenue
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}
